name: Let Me Off the Earth
overview: Three years of boring high school, barely graduating, and then being a freshman in high school again? A delightful teen sitcom about a 17-year-old boy and his friends who are living the same repetitive daily life for the 33rd time!

trailers.title: 영원히 스무 살이 될 수 없다고? [내리겠습니다 지구에서] - 예고
